title: Celestial Swords
description: A flashy little mod that brings elemental chaos and style to your Minecraft world!
body:
![These are the 3 swords.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a98cbb2d4224e035c58ea11f3ab18d1d87b8b60f_0.webp)
⚔️ Celestial Swords — Three mythical blades, each with its own power!
🌀 Kurozai pulls everything into a dark vortex, dragging mobs toward the center with unstoppable force.
🔥 Zanpakuto of Fire unleashes fiery explosions that scorch anything nearby and light up the battlefield.
❄️ IceGlacial freezes the land with icy spikes, locking enemies in place and covering the ground with frost.
Right-click to unleash the full power of each sword’s unique ability.
These weapons aren’t just strong — they completely change how you fight.
Each blade is rare, powerful, and carries a unique ability that can turn the tide of a battle instantly.
Only the bravest warriors can master all three without being overwhelmed by their energy.
Legends say that when all Celestial Swords are wielded together, their combined power can reshape the world itself.
Adventurers who seek them must be ready… because the swords test their owners just as much as their enemies.
